title: Blackstone stock price: BX is a good buy ahead of Q1 earnings
text: The Blackstone (NYSE: BX) stock price has crawled back in the past few days as investors wait for the upcoming quarterly earnings. The shares rose to a high of $87, which was ~20% above the lowest point this year.

title: Inflation's Last Stand
text: U.S. equity markets finished broadly higher this past week after a critical slate of inflation data provided further evidence of a definitive cool-down in inflationary pressures. After narrowly snapping a three-week winning streak in the prior week, the S&P 500 advanced 0.8% this week, while the Mid-Cap 400 and Small-Cap 600 posted gains of over 1%.

title: Blackstone and Dominium Expand Partnership to Bring Additional New Affordable Housing to Phoenix
text: LOS ANGELES & PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Blackstone (NYSE: BX), through its affordable housing portfolio company, April Housing (“April”), and Dominium, a leading affordable housing owner, developer and manager, today announced an expansion of their partnership to develop Casa Azure, which will bring 196 new affordable housing units to Phoenix, Arizona.

title: My Dividend Growth Portfolio March Update: Still Accumulating Cash
text: The portfolio remains at record high levels of cash holdings, which is fine for the first time in a long time, cash is providing a decent return. Income growth is projected at 7.9% for the year, up from last month. This was primarily due to including an estimated return on cash.

title: Cracks Emerge In Jobs Market
text: U.S. equity markets snapped a three-week winning streak while benchmark interest rates dipped to seven-month lows after a critical slate of employment data revealed some cracking in the long-resilient labor markets. Following its strongest weekly advance in five months, the S&P 500 finished fractionally lower this week, while the Mid-Cap 400 and Small-Cap 600 each posted steeper declines of over 2.5%.
